info.name: Serenity Jog Wheels
info.author: Serenity DJ System
info.description: Maps the Serenity hardware's two RPi GPIO optical rotary encoders (read via libgpiod and republished as MIDI CC over an ALSA virtual port by SerenityGpioJogWheelService) to the Deck A and Deck B jog wheels. See SERENITY.md for the GPIO pinout.
